headline: The top tech Prime Day deals to shop on day two
summary: Day two of Prime Day continues with top tech deals. Many best deals from day one are still available. New tech discounts have also emerged for Prime subscribers.

headline: This year's Prime Day deals on Apple products are the best I've seen
summary: Prime Day offers unprecedented deals on Apple products. Discounts available on wireless earbuds and smartwatches. Apple Watch Series 11 and AirPods Pro 3 hit new low prices.

headline: The 16 best robot vacuum deals available during Prime Day
summary: Prime Day offers significant discounts on robot vacuums. Day two features deals from Amazon, Best Buy, and Walmart. It's a prime opportunity to buy a robot vacuum at a reduced cost.

headline: Charlie Kirk's legacy is a 30-year sentence for moving zines
summary: Charlie Kirk's assassination led to a crackdown on free speech. President Trump's administration targeted 'antifa' terrorists. Eight Texans received 30-year sentences for moving zines.

headline: Avatar: The Last Airbender Season 2 Review
summary: Avatar: The Last Airbender Season 2 is reviewed. It shows vast improvement over the previous season. The season still suffers from some significant hiccups.

headline: Hundred Nights: DIFU is like Two Point Hospital... In Hell | IGN Preview
summary: Hundred Nights: DIFU is a Two Point-inspired game. It offers a cheeky take on Chinese mythology. Players design their own hellscape to punish souls.

headline: Grand Theft Auto 6 Preorders Are Live
summary: Grand Theft Auto 6 preorders are now live. Details for preordering on PS5 are available. Information for Xbox Series X|S preorders is also provided.

headline: Prime Day LEGO Deals on Sets for Adults Are Selling Out Fast
summary: Prime Day LEGO deals for adults are available. These specific LEGO sets are selling out quickly. Shoppers should act fast to secure adult LEGO deals.

headline: Watch: Moment earthquakes hit airport and buildings in Caracas
summary: Video captures earthquakes striking Caracas. Footage shows impacts at the airport and buildings. Residents are seen frantically evacuating after the quakes.

headline: How to cope in a heatwave - according to you
summary: Tips for coping during a heatwave are shared. Advice includes appropriate clothing choices. Strategies for restful sleep in the heat are offered.

headline: Reeves backs Burnham to become next prime minister
summary: The Chancellor publicly endorsed Andy Burnham. Burnham is backed to become the next prime minister. This support comes despite potential demotion threats.

headline: Bodies found in 'advanced deterioration' at under-fire trust
summary: Bodies in advanced deterioration found at NUH mortuaries. An inspection revealed 10 shortfalls at the trust. The Human Tissue Authority reported the findings.
